data.body:
## Description

Update plugins/dso/skills/roadmap/SKILL.md:
- Replace Phase 3 Step 1 inline 1-10 value/effort scoring (lines 125-127: 'Value (1-10)', 'Effort (1-10)') with instruction to read and apply shared scorer using 1-5 scale
- Update quadrant matrix example output (lines 155-169) to use 1-5 scale values
- Update Enabler Logic example (lines 134-136) to use 1-5 scale values (was 1-10)
- In Phase 5, scorer's recommended priority passed as -p <priority> to ticket create
- Remove RED marker from .test-index

SAFEGUARD FILE: protected per CLAUDE.md rule 18.

## File Impact
- MODIFY: plugins/dso/skills/roadmap/SKILL.md
- MODIFY: .test-index

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] `ruff check` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: ruff check $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/*.py $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/**/*.py
- [ ] `ruff format --check` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: ruff format --check $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/*.py $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/**/*.py
- [ ] Roadmap references shared scorer
  Verify: grep -q 'shared/prompts/value-effort-scorer' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/roadmap/SKILL.md
- [ ] No 1-10 scale in roadmap
  Verify: { grep -q 'Value (1-10)' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/roadmap/SKILL.md; test $? -ne 0; }
- [ ] .test-index RED marker removed
  Verify: { grep -q '\[test_scorer' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index; test $? -ne 0; }
